basic_details.job_title: DCPU Sheohar Support Person Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Child Protection Unit Sheohar (DCPU Sheohar)
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Sheohar, (DCPU Sheohar) Recruitment 2026: District Child Protection Unit Sheohar, has released the official notification for 5 Support Person posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 30 years Maximum Age: 65 years

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Social Work (MSW)/Sociology/Psychology/Child Development or Law or Diploma in Child Rights/Counseling with Bachelor's in any faculty and 3 years experience
qualification.details: Master's degree in Social Work (MSW)/Sociology/Psychology/Child Development or Law or Diploma in Child Rights/Counseling with Bachelor's degree in any discipline along with three years work experience.

salary_details.pay_scale: Maximum Rs. 9000/- per POCSO case (in three installments)
salary_details.details: Maximum Rs. 9000/- per POCSO case (in three installments)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://sheohar.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://sheohar.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DCPU Sheohar Support Person Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Sheohar Support Person posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DCPU Sheohar Support Person recruitment is 16th August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Support Person role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Social Work (MSW), Sociology, Psychology, Child Development, or Law. Alternatively, a Diploma in Child Rights/Counseling with a Bachelor's degree in any faculty and three years of experience is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to these positions?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 30 years, and the maximum age limit is 65 years for all Support Person posts in DCPU Sheohar.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the DCPU Sheohar Support Person recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Support Person post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the Support Person position in the District Child Protection Unit Sheohar.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the DCPU Sheohar Support Person recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Support Person role?
faq.answer: The salary is offered on a per-case basis, with a maximum of Rs. 9000/- per POCSO case, disbursed in three installments.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection criteria for the Support Person position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve evaluating candidates based on their Educational Qualification, followed by an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Child Protection Unit Sheohar, which is https://sheohar.nic.in.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents, including a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational and experience certificates, as specified in the official notification.
